name: Easy Plugin
description: Show, hide, reorder and add plugin configuration entries in the Jellyfin admin sidebar, with inline plugin settings. The client script is injected in-memory via the File Transformation plugin, so index.html is never patched on disk.
overview: Tidy the admin sidebar: hide, reorder and add plugin entries.

versions.changelog: First release. Hide, reorder and force-add plugin entries in the admin sidebar; collapsible groups for multi-page plugins; inline plugin settings via iframe. Injects via File Transformation (auto-installs it, or uses Custom Theme's bundled provider).
